title: Chef Aid Utility Knife with Cover (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
This Chef Aid utility knife with cover is made from high Quality stainless steel which cuts easily into vegetables, meat and fish
Strong solid grip handle for ease of use with safety cover, so you know your knife can be stored safely away in the drawer
Dishwasher safe but hand washing recommended to keep the blade nice and sharp and in pristine condition
Chef Aid Logo embossed on the blade
From a full range of kitchen knives produced by Chef Aid for all your food prep needs
description: From the manufacturer About Us Chef Aid is our most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality.
